info.name: Retail Insight — Order Cancellation Intelligence API
info.description:
Full API surface for the Retail Insight backend: analytics endpoints that drive the dashboard surfaces, plus AI-backed endpoints for the multi-LLM chat, narrator, recommender, and suggestion generator.

All analytics endpoints share five common query parameters — `stores`, `regions`, `date_from`, `date_to`, `reasons` — which are wired into the Postman parameter UI of every request (disabled by default; tick to enable). The `base_url` collection variable defaults to `http://localhost:8000`; override it in environments for staging/prod.

Every request has a sample 200 OK response drawn from the real workbook shape, so the schemas are visible without making a live call.

variable.description: FastAPI backend root URL. Override in environments.

request.description: Returns service metadata, version, and the top-level endpoint map.
Lightweight liveness check.

request.description: Severity-scored integrity checks across all source tables.

response.name: Sample response

query.description: Pipe-separated reason values, e.g. Out Of Stock|Customer Cancellation

response.body:
{
  "overall_severity": "high",
  "_granularity": "date",
  "checks": [
    {
      "name": "Cancels with no sub-reason",
      "value": 4470,
      "total": 8245,
      "share_pct": 54.21,
      "severity": "high",
      "description": "Cancels lacking a sub-reason force coarser root-cause analysis."
    },
    {
      "name": "Cancels with no matching inventory snapshot",
      "value": 1718,
      "total": 8245,
      "share_pct": 20.84,
      "severity": "medium",
      "description": "Cancellations whose order date has no inventory row — limits OOS analysis."
    },
    {
      "name": "Negative inventory records",
      "value": 954,
      "total": 221217,
      "share_pct": 0.43,
      "severity": "medium",
      "description": "Inventory rows with on-hand below zero — should not be physically possible."
    },
    {
      "name": "Products missing BRAND",
      "value": 26,
      "total": 174,
      "share_pct": 14.94,
      "severity": "medium",
      "description": "Catalogue rows lacking BRAND produce labelling gaps in aggregations."
    }
  ]
}

request.description: Code-derived insights with LLM-refined text. Same dict shape as the structured facts, with `_llm_used` flag.

response.name: Sample response

query.description: Pipe-separated reason values, e.g. Out Of Stock|Customer Cancellation

response.body:
{
  "top_store": {
    "severity": "high",
    "icon": "🚨",

    "store_num": 1426,
    "rate": 9.5,
    "avg_rate": 4.92,

  },
  "same_day_share": {
    "severity": "medium",
    "icon": "⏱",

    "severity": "high",
    "icon": "💧",

    "top_sku_qty": 4062
  },

    "severity": "high",

request.description: Status of the pre-processed parquet files (used by the notebook-driven ingestion path).

item.name: AI Insights
item.description: AI-backed surfaces. All fall back to deterministic templates when no API key is configured.

request.description: Which AI providers have an API key configured.
Send a question to one or more models. Multi-model mode uses asyncio.gather. Enable judge for a synthesised cross-model evaluation.
